sub_goals.description: renderer.js — subscribes to now-playing-source, composes 'title — artist', dispatches host.drawText for every live context. Branches marquee:true when composed text exceeds widget width (IP5).

verification_rationale: Renderer touches only host.drawText, host.onWillAppear, host.onWillDisappear, host.log on the host-integration surface, and source.subscribe on the now-playing-source surface — exactly the contracts. No direct WebSocket, no direct child_process, no album-art / lyrics / progress / network (DCA.OOS.album-art, DCA.OOS.cloud, DCA.OOS.telemetry all hold by absence). Marquee branch satisfies S3.A3 / IP5.A1.
